notes.title: Importance of Friends
notes.content: Friends are an important part of our lives, providing companionship and playfulness.

notes.title: Definition of Unlikely
notes.content: Something or someone that is unlikely is unexpected or unusual in a given situation.

notes.title: Gajaraj's Living Arrangements
notes.content: Gajaraj lived in the best booth of the royal stables, but felt lonely despite his comforts.

notes.title: The Role of the Mahout
notes.content: The mahout served Gajaraj food and gave him a bath, but was not a friend to the elephant.

notes.title: Gajaraj's Wish for Friendship
notes.content: Gajaraj wished he had a friend to play with, highlighting his desire for companionship.

notes.title: The Arrival of the Dog
notes.content: A dog arrived at the stable and became Gajaraj's first friend in the story.

notes.title: Gajaraj's Playfulness
notes.content: Gajaraj was playful with his new friend, splashing water on him during their bath time.

notes.title: Reunion of the Dog and His Owner
notes.content: The farmer was reunited with his dog, Buntee, after searching for him.

notes.title: Gajaraj's Generosity
notes.content: Gajaraj gave the dog a ride on his back when he took him home to his owner.

notes.title: Importance of Companionship
notes.content: The story highlights the importance of companionship and friendship in our lives.

facts.fact: Gajaraj lived in the best booth of the royal stables.
The king was fond of Gajaraj and ordered his care.
Gajaraj had no friends until the dog arrived at the stable.
The mahout served Gajaraj food and gave him a bath.
Gajaraj played with the dog during their bath time, splashing water on him.
Buntee was the name of the farmer's dog that went missing.
The farmer was reunited with his dog after searching for him everywhere.
Gajaraj gave the dog a ride on his back when he took him home to his owner.
Gajaraj and the dog became fast friends, providing each other with companionship.
The story highlights the importance of friendship and companionship in our lives.
